name: origammi-agents
description: Private marketplace of generic, senior-grade AI agents for Origammi projects. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, and Gemini.

plugins.name: dev-team
plugins.description: Core development team: designer, backend engineer, frontend engineer, and QA/tester. Stack-agnostic, senior-grade.

plugins.name: product
plugins.description: Product and squad management: PM for discovery/prioritization, manager for orchestrating the full team.

plugins.name: security
plugins.description: Security review team: offensive (red-team) and defensive (blue-team) gates. Includes prompt injection coverage.

plugins.name: engineering
plugins.description: Cross-cutting engineering: architect, DevOps, observability, API standards, and git/CI standards.

plugins.name: llm-eval
plugins.description: LLM evaluation and testing: behavioral assertions, regression tracking, and safety testing for AI agents using DeepEval.

plugins.name: references
plugins.description: On-demand reference skills: detailed code patterns invoked by other agents when needed.
